_doc: Voiceover for scripted-build cut, re-timed to actual phase data from 2026-04-30T13-21-51 take. Welcome → Daedalus identity → tell-me pan → casual ask → skill split → favorite model → v1 fail → tip → typed input → drop → react → v2 → fanout (with mesh rotate + full video) → models-list → tagline.

music.prompt: cinematic orchestral underscore, deep sub-bass drone, slow swelling strings, ethereal choir pad, distant taiko heartbeat, mythic and patient, modern film score, 65 bpm, instrumental, no vocals

sfx.prompt: short burst of mechanical keyboard typing, realistic, dry studio recording, no music
single mouse button click, brief snappy click, isolated, dry recording

sfx._note: second typing burst — 'I want this chibi style' (typing ~31.4s)
sfx.prompt: short burst of mechanical keyboard typing, realistic, dry studio recording, no music

sfx._note: drop sound when chibi image lands in chat (Image Input lands at 36.02s)
sfx.prompt: soft thump of a small object dropping on a desk, dry close-mic recording, isolated

segments.text: I have a skill for this model.
Let me re-prompt it the way gpt-image-2 likes.
Now I'll wire it to my favorite — gpt-image-2.
And here is what comes when I'm given only words.
If you want a specific style, give me an image to reference.
Oh — there I am. Handsome devil.
Yes. Look at me fly. Now that is handsome.
Now — what else this canvas can hold.
Each model has its own skill. They get better with every run.
